name: inwx
description: A Pulumi package for creating and managing inwx domain and dns resources.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`inwx` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/inwx/terraform-provider-inwx).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for creating and managing inwx domain and dns resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/inwx/terraform-provider-inwx)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-inwx` repo](https://github.com/wombelix/pulumi-inwx/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-inwx` repo](https://github.com/inwx/terraform-provider-inwx/issues).

apiUrl.description:
URL of the RPC API endpoint. Use `https://api.domrobot.com/jsonrpc/` for production and
`https://api.ote.domrobot.com/jsonrpc/` for tests

provider.description:
The provider type for the inwx package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

inwx:index/domain:Domain.description:
## Import

INWX Domains can be imported using the domain name, e.g.,

```sh
 $ pulumi import inwx:index/domain:Domain example_com "example.com"
```

extraData.description: Extra data, needed for some jurisdictions. Valid extra data types: https://www.inwx.de/en/help/apidoc/f/ch03.html#type.extdata

nameservers.description: Set of nameservers of the domain. Min Items: 1

period.description: Registration period of the domain. Valid types: https://www.inwx.de/en/help/apidoc/f/ch03.html#type.period

renewalMode.description: Renewal mode of the domain. One of: `AUTORENEW`, `AUTODELETE`, `AUTOEXPIRE`. Default: `AUTORENEW`

transferLock.description: Whether the domain transfer lock should be enabled. Default: `true`

transferLock.description: Whether the domain transfer lock should be enabled. Default: `true`

countryCode.description: Country code of the contact. Must be two characters

name.description: First and lastname of the contact

organization.description: The legal name of the organization. Required for types other than person

whoisProtection.description: Whether whois protection for the contact should be enabled. Depends on the registry supporting it. Not the same as whois protection for a domain

prio.description: Priority of the nameserver record. Default: `0`

testing.description: Execute command in testing mode. Default: `false`

ttl.description: TTL (time to live) of the nameserver record. Default: `3600`

type.description:
Type of the nameserver record. One of: `A`, `AAAA`, `AFSDB`, `ALIAS`, `CAA`, `CERT`, `CNAME`, 
`HINFO`, `KEY`, `LOC`, `MX`, `NAPTR`, `NS`, `OPENPGPKEY`, `PTR`, `RP`, `SMIMEA`, `SOA`, `SRV`, `SSHFP`, `TLSA`, `TXT`,
`URI`, `URL`

urlAppend.description: Append the path for redirection. Default: `false`

urlRedirectType.description: Type of the url redirection. One of: `HEADER301`, `HEADER302`, `FRAME`
